{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Monarch
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura Monarch]] can sense [[Mercy]]'s name spoken anywhere in the world.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura Monarch]] is a figure that Altavian compares to the offerings for [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Akura Monarch]] is a figure mentioned in relation to potential betrayal.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“You think we can offer him more than the Akura Monarch?”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
